name: SILENTTRINITY Stager Execution Detected
description: Detects the execution of the SILENTTRINITY stager, a component of a known post-exploitation framework. This is a strong indicator of an adversary attempting to establish a foothold on a system by executing a malicious payload.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious process associated with the **SILENTTRINITY stager** was detected. The event was triggered by the file **{message}** with Event ID **{event_id}**. This is a strong indicator of an **Execution** attempt (**MITRE ATT&CK T1569.002**) where an adversary is attempting to execute a malicious payload. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious file. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The message associated with the event, which contains the suspicious file name or command.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The event ID of the sysmon event.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
